name: Catchpoint Network Intelligence API
what_it_does: Enterprise synthetic and real user monitoring platform with REST API for managing synthetic tests, querying performance data from 2500+ global nodes, and monitoring internet infrastructure including CDN, DNS, and network paths.
use_cases: Running synthetic tests from hundreds of global locations to detect performance regressions
Querying CDN and DNS performance data for network optimization agents
Monitoring API endpoint performance from enterprise vantage points worldwide
Alerting on performance degradation via webhooks for incident response automation
Tracking user experience metrics across ISPs, browsers, and geographic regions
not_for: Small businesses — Catchpoint targets enterprise (Fortune 500) customers
Simple uptime monitoring (use Pingdom or UptimeRobot)
best_when: An agent monitors web application and internet performance from enterprise vantage points across carriers and geographic regions with deep CDN and DNS intelligence.
avoid_when: You need basic uptime monitoring — Catchpoint is enterprise-scale and priced accordingly.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow with API client ID and secret. Access tokens have 1-hour expiry. Scopes for read and write access to tests, data, and management. Developer portal for API registration.

pricing.notes: Enterprise pricing contact sales. Catchpoint targets Fortune 500 and carrier customers. Pricing based on test count, data center coverage, and features. Significant investment for global performance monitoring.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits documented per endpoint type

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Developer portal with REST API documentation. OAuth2 flow documented. Error responses are JSON with error codes and messages. Webhook payload schemas documented for integration.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Test creation by name may create duplicates — query before creating. Performance data queries are idempotent read operations.
known_agent_gotchas: OAuth2 token expires hourly — agents need automatic refresh logic
Test results may have ingestion delay (5-15 minutes) — real-time querying requires streaming
Different test types (transaction, object, traceroute) have different result schemas
2500+ monitoring nodes require geographic filtering for relevant data queries

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2 Type II and ISO 27001. OAuth2 client credentials for machine-to-machine auth. TLS enforced. Enterprise security practices with Fortune 500 customer base. GDPR compliant with EU data residency.
